label: rename_function
text: Rename a Python function across all callers in a repository. Use ast to find references rather than text replace, since text replace will match identifiers in strings and comments.

label: extract_method
text: Pull a block of inline code out into a named method. Identify free variables, decide which become parameters and which become attributes of the enclosing class.

label: add_test
text: Add a pytest test for a function. Mirror the directory structure of the source tree under tests/. Use parametrize for input matrices.

label: fix_import
text: Resolve a circular import by hoisting the shared types into a third module that neither original module imports from.

label: summarise_paper
text: Produce a one-page summary of an academic paper covering motivation, method, results, and limitations. Quote numerical results verbatim.

label: find_sources
text: Given a claim, locate three independent sources that support or refute it. Prefer primary sources over secondary.

label: compare_papers
text: Compare two papers on overlapping topics. Identify shared assumptions, methodological differences, and contradictory findings.

label: clip_layer
text: Clip a WFS layer to the bounding box of an address. Use GeoPandas with the appropriate coordinate reference system.

label: reproject
text: Reproject a shapefile from EPSG 2193 (NZTM) to EPSG 4326 (WGS84). Preserve attribute table.

label: render_map
text: Render a Leaflet HTML map from a GeoJSON file. Centre on the feature centroid, set zoom so all features fit.

label: add_calendar_event
text: Add an event to a Google Calendar with title, start, end, and optional attendees. Use ISO 8601 timestamps.

label: list_today
text: List events on a Google Calendar for today. Include start times in local timezone.

label: ssh_run
text: Run a command on a remote host over SSH and capture stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use BatchMode to avoid interactive prompts.

label: tail_log
text: Stream the last N lines of a remote log file with follow mode. Reconnect if the SSH session drops.

label: rsync_dir
text: Mirror a local directory to a remote host with rsync. Preserve permissions, delete extraneous files on the remote, exclude .git and .venv.
